```text
665	<body>
666	  <header class="site-header">
667	    <a href="/" class="logo">nasapicture.com</a>
668	    <h1 id="site-heading" class="hero-tagline">Astronomy Picture of the Day</h1>
669	    <nav class="site-nav" aria-label="Site navigation">
670	    </nav>
671	  </header>
672	
673	  <main>
674	    <section class="hero" aria-labelledby="site-heading">
675	      <figure class="hero-image-area">
676	        <img src="https://api.nasapicture.com/optimized" alt="NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day" class="hero-img"
677	          id="hero-img" loading="eager" fetchpriority="high">
678	        <figcaption class="hero-caption" id="hero-caption">
679	          <p class="hero-caption-title" id="caption-title"></p>
680	          <time class="hero-caption-date" id="caption-date"></time>
681	        </figcaption>
682	      </figure>
683	
684	      <div class="usage-row">
685	        <p class="usage-item"><span>New day, new photo, same URL</span> <code class="usage-url" title="Click to copy"
686	            data-copy="https://api.nasapicture.com/">https://api.nasapicture.com<span class="copy-btn" aria-label="Copy URL"><svg class="copy" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"/></svg></span><span class="copied-badge"><svg class="check" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg><span class="copied-text">Copied</span></span></code>
687	        </p>
688	        <p class="usage-item"><span>Use it anywhere you'd put an image URL</span> <code class="usage-url"
689	            title="Click to copy"
690	            data-copy='&lt;img src="https://api.nasapicture.com/"&gt;'>&lt;img src="https://api.nasapicture.com/"&gt;<span class="copy-btn" aria-label="Copy img tag"><svg class="copy" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"/></svg></span><span class="copied-badge"><svg class="check" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg><span class="copied-text">Copied</span></span></code>
691	        </p>
692	      </div>
693	    </section>
694	
695	    <section class="info">
696	      <div class="fade-up">
697	        <h2>Endpoints</h2>
698	        <nav class="endpoint-list" aria-label="API endpoints">
699	          <a class="endpoint-row animated-bottom-border" href="https://api.nasapicture.com/" target="_blank"
700	            rel="noopener noreferrer">
701	            <code class="endpoint-route">/</code>
702	            <span class="endpoint-desc">HD image, falls back to standard</span>
703	            <code class="endpoint-type">image/*</code>
704	          </a>
705	          <a class="endpoint-row animated-bottom-border" href="https://api.nasapicture.com/sd" target="_blank"
706	            rel="noopener noreferrer">
707	            <code class="endpoint-route">/sd</code>
708	            <span class="endpoint-desc">Standard resolution image</span>
709	            <code class="endpoint-type">image/*</code>
710	          </a>
711	          <a class="endpoint-row animated-bottom-border" href="https://api.nasapicture.com/info" target="_blank"
712	            rel="noopener noreferrer">
713	            <code class="endpoint-route">/info</code>
714	            <span class="endpoint-desc">Title, date, explanation, URLs, copyright</span>
715	            <code class="endpoint-type">application/json</code>
716	          </a>
717	          <a class="endpoint-row animated-bottom-border" href="https://api.nasapicture.com/about" target="_blank"
718	            rel="noopener noreferrer">
719	            <code class="endpoint-route">/about</code>
720	            <span class="endpoint-desc">Description and route listing</span>
721	            <code class="endpoint-type">text/plain</code>
722	          </a>
723	        </nav>
724	      </div>
725	    </section>
726	  </main>
727	
728	  <footer>
729	    <div class="footer-inner">
730	      <p>Built by <a href="https://grantkeller.dev" class="animated-bottom-border" target="_blank"
731	          rel="noopener noreferrer">Grant Keller</a> at <a href="https://davantsystems.com"
732	          class="animated-bottom-border" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Davant Systems</a></p>
733	      <p class="footer-links">
734	        <a href="https://apod.nasa.gov/" class="animated-bottom-border" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">NASA
735	          Astronomy Picture of the Day</a>
736	        <a href="https://github.com/GDKeller/nasa-picture-proxy" class="animated-bottom-border" target="_blank"
737	          rel="noopener noreferrer">Source</a>
738	      </p>
739	    </div>
740	  </footer>
741	
742	  <button type="button" class="focus-toggle" id="focus-toggle" aria-label="Dim the lights" title="Dim the lights">
743	    <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"
744	      stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
745	      <path d="M12 12v6" />
746	      <path
747	        d="M4.077 10.615A1 1 0 0 0 5 12h14a1 1 0 0 0 .923-1.385l-3.077-7.384A2 2 0 0 0 15 2H9a2 2 0 0 0-1.846 1.23Z" />
748	      <path d="M8 20a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H9a1 1 0 0 1-1-1z" />
749	    </svg>
750	  </button>
751	  <div class="focus-overlay" id="focus-overlay"></div>
752	
753	  <script>
754	    const PROD_BASE = 'https://api.nasapicture.com';
755	    const API_BASE = location.hostname === 'localhost' ? `http://localhost:8787` : PROD_BASE;
756	    const img = document.getElementById('hero-img');
757	
758	    function onImageReady() { img.classList.add('loaded'); }
759	
760	    const defined_replace = (str) => str.replace(PROD_BASE, API_BASE);
761	    img.src = defined_replace(img.src);
762	    document.querySelectorAll(`a[href^="${PROD_BASE}"]`).forEach(a => {
763	      a.href = defined_replace(a.href);
764	    });
765	    document.querySelectorAll('.usage-url[data-copy]').forEach(el => {
766	      el.dataset.copy = defined_replace(el.dataset.copy);
767	    });
768	    document.querySelectorAll('.usage-url').forEach(el => {
769	      el.childNodes.forEach(node => {
770	        if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
771	          node.textContent = defined_replace(node.textContent);
772	        }
773	      });
774	    });
775	
776	    // Fetch APOD metadata for caption (image loads directly from proxy)
777	    fetch(`${API_BASE}/info`)
778	      .then(r => r.json())
779	      .then(data => {
780	        if (data.title) {
781	          img.alt = data.title;
782	          document.getElementById('caption-title').textContent = data.title;
783	          const dateEl = document.getElementById('caption-date');
784	          dateEl.textContent = data.date;
785	          dateEl.setAttribute('datetime', data.date);
786	          dateEl.title = 'NASA publishes on Eastern Time';
787	          document.getElementById('hero-caption').classList.add('visible');
788	        }
789	      })
790	      .catch(() => { });
791	
792	    img.addEventListener('load', onImageReady);
793	
794	    // Copy on click
795	    document.querySelectorAll('.usage-url[data-copy]').forEach(el => {
796	      el.addEventListener('click', () => {
797	        const text = el.dataset.copy;
798	        navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
799	          el.classList.add('copied');
800	          el.querySelector('.copy-btn').classList.add('copied');
801	          setTimeout(() => {
802	            el.classList.remove('copied');
803	            el.querySelector('.copy-btn').classList.remove('copied');
804	          }, 2000);
805	        });
806	      });
807	    });
808	
809	    // Scroll fade-in
810	    const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
811	      entries.forEach(entry => {
812	        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
813	          entry.target.classList.add('visible');
814	          observer.unobserve(entry.target);
815	        }
816	      });
817	    }, { threshold: 0.15 });
818	
819	    document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
820	
821	    // Focus mode
822	    const toggle = document.getElementById('focus-toggle');
823	    const overlay = document.getElementById('focus-overlay');
824	    function setFocusMode(on) {
825	      document.body.classList.toggle('focus-mode', on);
826	    }
827	
828	    // Toggle focus mode on button click
829	    toggle.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
830	      e.stopPropagation();
831	      setFocusMode(!document.body.classList.contains('focus-mode'));
832	    });
833	
834	    // Exit focus mode on overlay click or Escape key
835	    overlay.addEventListener('click', () => setFocusMode(false));
836	    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
837	      if (e.key === 'Escape') setFocusMode(false);
838	    });
839	  </script>
840	</body>
841	
842	</html>
```

```scss
.hero {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  padding-top: 2rem;
}

.hero-image-area {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 3.75rem 1.2rem 0;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  margin-bottom: 6rem;
  max-width: 100%;

  @media (min-width: 640px) {
    padding: 4.25rem 2.5rem 0;
  }

  @media (min-width: 768px) {
    min-height: calc(50vh);
  }

  @media (min-width: 1024px) {
    min-height: calc(80vh + 3.75rem);
  }
}

.hero-tagline {
  flex: 1;
  text-align: right;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  line-height: 0.8em;
  font-weight: var(--font-weight-medmium);
  color: var(--silver-dim);
  white-space: nowrap;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  word-spacing: 0.1em;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fade-in 0.8s ease 0.3s forwards;

  @media (min-width: 640px) {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
  }

  @media (min-width: 768px) {
    font-size: 1.0rem;
    text-align: center;
  }
}

.hero-img {
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 80vh;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.8s ease, max-height 0.3s ease;
  box-shadow: 0 0.3rem 1rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), 0 1rem 6rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  z-index: 60;

  &.loaded {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

.hero-caption {
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  padding: 0.6rem 0.25rem;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--silver-dim);
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.5s ease;

  @media (min-width: 640px) {
    min-width: 30rem;
  }

  &.visible {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

.hero-caption-title {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-weight: var(--font-weight-regular);
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  word-spacing: 0.02em;
  color: var(--silver);
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.hero-caption-date {
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  color: var(--silver-dim);
}

.usage-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.2rem 2.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fade-in 0.8s ease 0.8s forwards;

  @media (min-width: 640px) {
    padding: 1.25rem 2.5rem 3rem;
  }
}

.usage-item {
  display: flex;
  padding-top: 0.1em;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--silver-dim);
}

code {
  background: var(--void-up);
  padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: 0;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--silver-dim);
}

.usage-url {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: color 0.2s;
  position: relative;

  &::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -3px;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: #fff;
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: right;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease-out;
  }

  &:hover {
    color: #fff;

    &::after {
      transform: scaleX(1);
      transform-origin: left;
      transition: transform 0.2s ease-in;
    }
  }

  &.copied .copied-badge {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

.copy-btn {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: var(--silver-dim);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0.15rem;
  transition: color 0.2s, opacity 0.2s;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  opacity: 0.5;
  position: relative;

  svg {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
  }

  &.copied .copy {
    visibility: hidden;
  }
}

.usage-url:hover .copy-btn {
  color: #fff;
  opacity: 1;
}

.copied-badge {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: calc(100% + 4px);
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.2rem;
  color: var(--nasa-blue-light);
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.2s ease;

  .check {
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
  }

  .copied-text {
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
}
```

```scss
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  *,
```
